programme.desc: A charismatic jeweler makes a high-stakes bet that could lead to the windfall of a lifetime. In a precarious high-wire act, he must balance business, family and adversaries on all sides in pursuit of the ultimate win.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: When Niall's estranged brother Ruben shows up at his wedding, it leads to an explosion of violence that catapults us back through their lives, from the eighties to the present day.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie tries to repair the damage caused by negative AI press and save Mark's reality show job by making an appearance on "Finance Dudes.".

programme.title: Fahrenheit 451
programme.desc: In a future society where books are banned and burned, a fireman begins to read in secret and discovers an underground rebellion committed to protecting literature.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: The Mummy
programme.desc: The Mummy is a rousing, suspenseful and horrifying epic about an expedition of treasure-seeking explorers in the Sahara Desert in 1925. Stumbling upon an ancient tomb, the hunters unwittingly set loose a 3,000-year-old legacy of terror, which is embodied in the vengeful reincarnation of an Egyptian priest who had been sentenced to an eternity as one of the living dead.

programme.title: The Mummy Returns
programme.desc: Ten years after the events of the first film, Rick and Evelyn O'Connell are settled in 1935 London, where they are raising their son. When a chain of events finds the corpse of Imhotep resurrected, the O'Connells go on a desperate race to save the world from unspeakable evil and to rescue their son before it is too late.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie tries to repair the damage caused by negative AI press and save Mark's reality show job by making an appearance on "Finance Dudes.".

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: Insidious: The Red Door
programme.desc: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: Final Destination Bloodlines
programme.desc: Plagued by a violent and recurring nightmare, a college student heads home to track down the one person who might be able to break the cycle of death and save her family from the grisly demise that inevitably awaits them all.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: The Terminator
programme.desc: Disguised as a human, a cyborg assassin known as a Terminator (Arnold Schwarzenegger) travels from 2029 to 1984 to kill Sarah Connor (Linda Hamilton). Sent to protect Sarah is Kyle Reese (Michael Biehn), who divulges the coming of Skynet, an artificial intelligence system that will spark a nuclear holocaust. Sarah is targeted because Skynet knows that her unborn son will lead the fight against them. With the virtually unstoppable Terminator in hot pursuit, she and Kyle attempt to escape.

programme.title: The Suicide Squad
programme.desc: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: Thoughts & Prayers
programme.desc: Capturing the impact of the three billion dollar active shooter preparedness industry on schools and communities across America.

programme.title: Mob Stories
programme.desc: Four informants and an imprisoned "wiseguy" tell their stories and reveal secrets about America's organized crime families.

programme.title: The Truth About Killer Robots
programme.desc: Filmmaker Maxim Pozdorovkin explores the many ways in which artificial intelligence is taking over people's lives and making them increasingly obsolete.

programme.title: Wedding Crashers
programme.desc: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

programme.title: Wilson
programme.desc: Feeling lonely and isolated, Wilson (Woody Harrelson) tracks down Pippa (Laura Dern), the ex-wife who left him 17 years earlier. She tells the neurotic and middle-aged misanthrope that he is the father of a teenager named Claire (Isabella Amara). Shocked, excited and hopeful, Wilson embarks on a madcap quest to connect with the daughter he never knew he had.

programme.title: Zola
programme.desc: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Moonlight
programme.desc: A look at three defining chapters in the life of Chiron, a young black man growing up in Miami. His epic journey to manhood is guided by the kindness, support and love of the community that helps raise him.

programme.title: The Shape of Water
programme.desc: Elisa is a mute, isolated woman who works as a cleaning lady in a hidden, high-security government laboratory in 1962 Baltimore. Her life changes forever when she discovers the lab's classified secret -- a mysterious, scaled creature from South America that lives in a water tank. As Elisa develops a unique bond with her new friend, she soon learns that its fate and very survival lies in the hands of a hostile government agent and a marine biologist.

programme.title: The Legend of Ochi
programme.desc: In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy farm girl named Yuri is raised to fear elusive animals known as ochi. But when Yuri discovers a wounded baby ochi has been left behind, she escapes on a quest to bring him home.

programme.title: Dune
programme.desc: Paul Atreides, a brilliant and gifted young man born into a great destiny beyond his understanding, must travel to a dangerous planet in the universe to ensure the future of his family and his people. As malevolent forces explode into conflict over the planet's exclusive supply of a precious resource in existence, only those who can conquer their own fear will survive.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two
programme.desc: Paul Atreides unites with Chani and the Fremen while seeking revenge against the conspirators who destroyed his family. Facing a choice between the love of his life and the fate of the universe, he must prevent a terrible future only he can foresee.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: In 1991, the murder of four teenage girls rocks the city of Austin; a lack of hard evidence soon thwarts the investigation.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: After years of false leads and wrongful arrests, new investigators take over the case and revisit a key interrogation video.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: As the investigation increasingly focuses on the young suspects, police subject them to further videotaped interrogations, which reveal contradictory and unstable versions of what happened and some confessions.

programme.title: The Yogurt Shop Murders
programme.desc: When new DNA evidence leads to Springsteen and Scott's release, the victims' families must grapple with the unknown.

programme.title: Table 19
programme.desc: Ex-maid of honor Eloise - having been relieved of her duties after being unceremoniously dumped by the best man via text - decides to hold her head high and attend her oldest friend's wedding anyway. She finds herself seated at the random table in the back of the ballroom with a disparate group of strangers, most of whom should have known to just send regrets. As everyone's secrets are revealed, Eloise learns a thing or two from the denizens of Table 19.

programme.title: Twilight
programme.desc: High-school student Bella Swan, always a bit of a misfit, doesn't expect life to change much when she moves from sunny Arizona to rainy Washington state. Then she meets Edward Cullen, a handsome but mysterious teen whose eyes seem to peer directly into her soul. Edward is a vampire whose family does not drink blood, and Bella, far from being frightened, enters into a dangerous romance with her immortal soulmate.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: New Moon
programme.desc: After the abrupt departure of Edward, her vampire love, Bella finds comfort in her deepening friendship with Jacob Black. However, Bella's loyalties are put to the test as she becomes drawn into the world of werewolves, ancient enemies of vampires.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: After David Sconce takes over his family's mortuary business, a local funeral director makes allegations about the crematorium.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: David expands the business as allegations of abuse mount; following his arrest, evidence is discovered in the death of a rival.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: Members of the Lamb family are convicted of various crimes, including fraud; while in prison, a murder charge is brought against David for the death of his competitor.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. It's Diversity and Inclusion Week and The Brimble, the most 'woke' girl at the school, has convinced the headmaster that the pupils should be set the task of pairing up with their polar opposite and present their differences and common ground in a presentation. Mo, who has fancied The Brimble for ages, spots his opportunity to try and impress her by suggesting they team up as he is a devout practising Muslim (he's not). Fascinated by his alleged faith, The Brimble leaps at the chance and asks if she can come to his house to observe a real Muslim family - keen to keep up the pretence, Mo calls his non-practicing Muslim parents and begs them to help him out. They agree... but when Mo and The Brimble arrive at the house, it becomes apparent that they are going to teach their son a life lesson about truth and faith.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. It's time for the Lupercalia - the Roman festival of love - when Marcus is asked out by Gloria from next door, but he can't tell if it's a date or a meeting about their party wall. Meanwhile, Jason tries to maintain his Lupercalia perfect score as Grumio enjoys a romantic meal for one...

programme.title: Olivia & Alex: Parenthood
programme.desc: Love Island’s Olivia & Alex Bowen invite us behind the scenes of family life as they juggle careers and parenting, while struggling to find quality time together as a couple. After early scans raised the excitement of expecting twins, the episode begins with an emotional appearance on Loose Women, where they describe their experience of Vanishing Twin Syndrome. As the birth of their daughter grows closer, Olivia feels the strain of daily life, while Alex’s decision to enter a bodybuilding competition couldn’t come at a busier time. Their 3-year-old son Abel provides endless laughs and challenges, from chaotic early mornings, to heart-melting moments at his swimming lessons. Through all the ups and downs, Olivia and Alex’s playful banter shines, especially when Alex’s carelessness threatens to derail their romantic Paris getaway. Honest, warm and full of heart, this is not just reality TV — it’s a candid, funny and deeply relatable look at love, loss and modern family life.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex

After being treated to a glamorous day of hair, make-up and styling, the final three are thrown straight into one of the series' most high-stakes challenges yet. When Meg gets two tickets to a laser concert featuring Dua Lipa, her family, Quagmire and Herbert refuse to go with her while Lois goes separately with Bonnie and Donna - feeling rejected, Meg discovers a programme for local losers with the goal of sending one student to Mars and signs up for the cause, but she ends up having second thoughts about space travel when she successfully passes the training course.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City
programme.desc: Choir of Chaos: US reality series. When all hell breaks loose at choir auditions as Jen confronts Angie H, Lisa is prompted to recommit to her faith as a result. [S] S3 Ep7

programme.title: The Real Housewives of New Jersey
programme.desc: US reality series following the lavish lifestyle of New Jersey housewives and their families. As the group's Jersey shore weekend continues, friendship dynamics take surprising shifts as Bill Aydin awkwardly rejects a birthday party invite and turns issues between Jennifer and Melissa from bad to worse, Teresa and Louie tearfully say goodbye to Gabriella, and tension between Rachel, Margret and Jennifer Fessler reaches a breaking point at Joe Gorga's birthday party.

programme.title: Ant & Dec's Limitless Win
programme.desc: Ant and Dec are back with their never-ending money ladder, a limitless pot of cash, and a stack of fiendish questions whose answers are all numbers. First up are brother and sister-in-law Joe and Jo to take on the Limitless Ladder - they've been prepping by going round the supermarket measuring things with a tape measure, but their hard work will only pay off if they cash out before they crash out. It's then the turn of stepfather and son-in-law Steve and Jordan to play - they reckon that their generation gap is going to help them cover a broad range of knowledge, but it needs to help them climb high enough up the Limitless Ladder to find themselves among truly life-changing sums of money.

programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series set in a 1960s Yorkshire village. Nick's job intrudes on his social life when news of an antiques theft interrupts a date, and Greengrass's nephew turns up with a business proposition for Claude.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. The police are baffled by a campaign of threats against a local shopkeeper. Gina's new boyfriend is hired as pub chef, and Greengrass is alarmed by mysterious events on the moor.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones are reluctantly taking part in a team-building weekend run by Midsomer Yeomanry's Territorial Army, under the command of Colonel Matt Parkes, a haulage boss. The policemen are called away to investigate an explosion at Parkes' haulage yard. The yard is run by Parkes' shady son James, who has a reputation for being ruthless both in business and with women. Barnaby and Jones suspect arson. Is James capable of the crime? He has a lot of enemies, including the grieving mother of a girl who killed herself two years before. But when a man he was seen arguing with turns up dead, James falls under suspicion. More is yet to come, as the TA begin their war games - which may turn more realistic than they are supposed to be.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Doug awaits Hilary's arrival at Arthur's party. Carl and Anna are caught up in a bidding war over Mill Cottage.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. Nick and Jo are worried about a disruptive village schoolboy. Greengrass hatches a plan to 'borrow' Lord Ashfordly's racehorse.

programme.title: Heartbeat

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace and Branson take steps to verify Cassian's intel about Sandy's murder, the body of student Charlie Downing is found in a sea lock, and Grace must find out who wanted this young woman dead - as the team investigates the campus and news of Charlie spreads like wildfire, it becomes clear that this university harbours secrets that could be connected to Charlie's death. Grace soon has his sights set on a killer who will stop at nothing to prevent one particular truth from getting out...

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When eminent lawyer Anaan Kamel is found dead by an underground river, evidence seems to point to former employee Marcus Leyton, with whom she was having an affair - however, Banks and Helen believe that the family are hiding something when daughter Nafeesah reveals that Anaan's brother Bilal hit her during an argument. When Marcus's body is found upstream, the team are faced with a double murder and evidence at the crime scene makes them suspect a contract killing.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Having received a terrifying warning from contract killer Mullen about what to expect if he talks to the police, witness Geoff Dwyer and his teenage daughter Evie are now living in fear for their lives - Banks moves them to an anonymous hotel while he turns his attention to Lewis Hargreaves, the imprisoned loan shark who he believes to be calling the shots. Mullen then stalks Evie's boyfriend, leading him to the hotel where she and her father are staying - after he sets off the fire alarm to bring his prey out into the open, the team close in but Mullen again slips through the net. While the murderer's identity is now clear, it remains uncertain who was behind the killings and their motive until a discovery in the first victim's locker sheds fresh light on the case.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When Lewis and Hathaway investigate the murder of university psychologist Reuben Beatty, it appears that he has been injected with a powerful paralysing agent - it is then revealed that Beatty had been moonlighting as a clairvoyant. Beatty's colleague Vicki Walmsley is convinced that his mentor, along with Beatty's military paymasters, may have killed him to keep him quiet - as Lewis and Hathaway struggle to unpick his baffling double life, Vicki herself is murdered and it becomes obvious that dark forces are at work... and not just in the afterlife.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Stan is finally issued with a new uniform.

When psychic Cyrus LeVanu conducts spiritual healing in the woods and unearths a man's body to his horror, can Barnaby and Jones discover the secret of Barton Woods and find the killer amid rumours of witchcraft and an antiques racket?

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. The police investigate a case of hit and run - and Maggie is the chief suspect. Greengrass dabbles in taxidermy, and Jo has a proposal for Nick.

programme.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire. After being sacked, a man goes berserk but Greengrass is on hand with a plan. Aidensfield becomes the location for a fashion photo shoot, and Nick's relationship with Jo is put to the test.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: A special episode of the crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. It may be the run-up to Christmas, but this doesn't mean that DCI Vera Stanhope can slow down and enjoy a bit of Secret Santa and some mince pies. The apparent suicide of Rick Kelasall, a scandal-hit television personality, sees Vera's boss insist that she personally take a look into the case as it's a high-profile death on Holy Island - and that's her home stomping ground. Vera soon works out that there is more to Rick's death than initially suspected... and that he was murdered. Rick had been attending a reunion with old friends, a ritual they have all stayed true to for over 40 years - had one of those at the reunion been holding a grudge for all these years and finally snapped, is his death related to the scandal that has knocked his career sideways, or is it something much more obscure? How far will the killer - or killers go - to cover their tracks... and could Vera and her team be in danger?

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The body of undergraduate Josh Tate is found dumped in a ravine stabbed with a screwdriver - his flatmate Spencer Foster says that Josh was the quiet type as he last saw him heading off to his part-time job at the university lab. As the team piece together his movements, a picture emerges of another Josh who was infatuated with Spencer's lap-dancer girlfriend Melanie and was manufacturing ecstasy for club owner Liam Fallon - meanwhile, Helen is unnerved by the arrival of her former lover Martin Hexton, an undercover officer who claims to be working a case in Yorkshire. When the team go to question Fallon, they find him badly beaten and it looks as if Hexton may be responsible - Banks is furious with Helen for not revealing the full extent of her relationship with Hexton earlier and she tries to win back his faith by leading him to the place where Hexton has been staying... however, he has since disappeared without trace.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Banks thinks that former undercover policeman Martin Hexton beat up Liam Fallon - a suspect in the Josh Tate murder - but Fallon swears that he did not see his assailant. When Helen works hard to win back Banks's approval and discovers that Hexton is actually Josh's biological father in the process, Banks and Helen question Hexton over the beating of Fallon but he admits nothing. The team eventually have to let him go and Banks realises that Josh's friend Spencer Foster is the most likely suspect for his murder yet struggles to pin anything on him - when Spencer is released, Hexton then abducts him...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Hathaway is taking time off in Kosovo as Lewis visits Louise Cornish, who is devastated that her policeman husband Jack has walked out on the family - when a recently embalmed body is discovered dumped by an isolated farm track, GP Matt Whitby confirms that he died of cancer... but who was he? Chief Superintendent Innocent reveals that Jack had taken up with Tara Faulkner, the wife of well-known miscreant Peter Faulkner -Dr Whitby is found dead at his desk poisoned with formaldehyde...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: While family life is far from normal at the home of Eileen Fountain - the steward at prestigious Whiteoaks Golf Club - club captain Martin Crisp is trying to buy back nearby Pellings, a rambling manor house once owned by his family, from golfing president Will Tunstall. As the peaceful setting of the prestigious club is rocked by death and controversy when a golfer is bludgeoned to death near the notorious 13th hole known as Crisp's Folly, Barnaby and Jones learn that crime is rife there...

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo stands up to Andy when he becomes violent. Bob struggles to cope running both the cafe and the post office, and Laurel is disgusted to learn Doug spent the night with Bonnie.

programme.desc: Nick is concerned when a young black Londoner becomes the suspect in a violent robbery, and Greengrass takes bets on a cricket match against Whitby.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. PC Penhale is desperate to keep Maggie and show her that he's changed, but Maggie plans to return to Bude once she has the all-clear from her doctor - as Penhale resorts to desperate measures to convince her to stay, a final effort at bravado in trying to climb a ladder to rescue school caretaker Mr Coley from the roof fails miserably when he is frozen with fear halfway up the ladder. Meanwhile, Mr Coley has become increasingly muddled and has put the children at risk by spraying poisonous fertiliser - when he doesn't know why he's on the roof, the Doc must bravely scale Penhale's ladder to rescue him. Elsewhere, Aunt Ruth uncovers a chest of family heirlooms when she clears out a barn at the farm that bring back poignant memories of an unhappy childhood for Martin, and tension mounts between Louisa and Martin when they can't seem to agree on anything and she learns that Martin has set a date for their baby's christening without even consulting her.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Bert's restaurant is financial trouble as he can't even afford the food and drink for a charity event to raise money for Florence Dingle's cat sanctuary - Mrs Dingle is distraught as she desperately needs the money to continue to look after the cats and kittens in her care. Bert is also being chased by loan sharks Alastair Tonken and his son Norman for the repayment of money they gave him to clear his debts - when Bert and Al decide to confront the loan sharks just as they are approaching Mrs Dingley to pressure her for money they loaned to her, Mrs Dingley falls off her bike and lapses in and out of consciousness with the Doc and PC Penhale in attendance. Meanwhile, Louisa's mum Eleanor's attempt to come to Bert's rescue ends up with her requiring the Doc's help with a condition that requires immediate care, and Martin shows little interest in organising James Henry's christening in the village with Louisa as he continues his plans to resume his surgical career.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a victim of a frenzied attack is found in the woods with his head caved in, initially the team wonders if it is a random attack or related to the location where a local girl recently died by suicide - Banks, however, has a theory of his own. When the victim is identified as small-time drug dealer Damon Horsley and Banks uncovers a link to local crime boss Steve Richards, he is convinced that the hitherto untouchable Richards had a part in the murder.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The apparent suicide of Steve Richards' daughter Kat leaves the grieving father to conduct his own unique brand of investigation that relies on violence to procure answers - meanwhile, Banks is suspicious, a hunch that is confirmed when it seems that Kat's death is not suicide after all and that someone else may have been involved. The team now have two murders to solve... and the pressure is on.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: After seven years of ducking the question, Lewis and Hobson are embarking on a relationship while the Oxford detective has a new mystery to solve - former don Richard Seager is murdered on the night of his release from prison after being crushed to death by a Jaguar Mark II. Seager's wife Martha insists that Rachel Cliff, the sister of Seager's victim, is the killer - Lewis and Hathaway visit Rachel, who claims that she spent the night at Benison College with Adam Tibbit. Investigations at the college reveal that Seager not only had major disagreements with the provost, but was also preparing to divorce Martha...

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur ventures into the wine trade with a vintage supplied by the Brothers of the Blessed Bidolph, a small monastic order nestling just off of the A2.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank go head to head when they search a jam-packed barn and 26 underground rooms for precious objects with the loser having to clean the van.

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole and his partners Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back on the road and trawling Britain's sheds and auction houses for rusty relics to restore and sell on for a tidy profit - this time they're in Stafford with a stall full of bikes and trinkets they've picked up in Hereford and Whitstable.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa
programme.desc: Boxing sequel. When he loses a highly-publicised virtual boxing match to ex-champ Rocky Balboa, reigning heavyweight titleholder Mason Dixon retaliates by challenging the Italian to a nationally-televised 10-round exhibition bout. To the surprise of his son and friends, Rocky agrees to come out of retirement and face an opponent who is faster, stronger, and 30 years younger than him - with the odds stacked firmly against Rocky, he takes on Dixon in what will become the greatest fight in boxing history and a hard-hitting, action-packed battle of the ages.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Rocky Balboa

When he loses a highly-publicised virtual boxing match to ex-champ Rocky Balboa, reigning heavyweight titleholder Mason Dixon retaliates by challenging the Italian to a nationally-televised 10-round exhibition bout. To the surprise of his son and friends, Rocky agrees to come out of retirement and face an opponent who is faster, stronger, and 30 years younger than him - with the odds stacked firmly against Rocky, he takes on Dixon in what will become the greatest fight in boxing history and a hard-hitting, action-packed battle of the ages.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Collision
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from AEW's newest show, featuring stars including Kyle Fletcher, Kazuchika Okada, Megan Bayne, Tommaso Ciampa and Claudio Castagnoli.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Classic '70s police series. New recruit Bob Hargreaves joins the Sweeney in time to investigate a violent burglary by a group of ex-soldiers, but is the newcomer up to it? Jack Regan thinks not, but nobody seems to share his view...

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Arthur is under suspicion when Her Indoors goes missing, but he's got the more important matter of a cash flow problem on his mind.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Robin is sued by a con man who makes a tidy income out of taking legal action over fake accidents, but the plaintiff is murdered before his claim can be heard in court - Thomas finds himself with some unwanted but beautiful help in his subsequent investigation of the case.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates the case of a surgeon in desperate need of money to pay off enormous gambling debts - the physician is breaking the law by recommending that his patients undergo expensive and unnecessary operations at risk to their own lives while thugs pressure the families of the victims to pay for the dangerous treatment.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: More action and intrigue with suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. Paris nightclub owner Paul Verrier is tricked into believing that The Saint is trying to kill him, so he contacts various people to murder Simon - however, Verrier has never seen one of his nefarious contacts, so when The Saint eventually pays a call, he is mistaken for his hired assassin and inadvertently hired to kill himself.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Richard Griffiths guest stars in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. When the new bar mirror and The Grand's crockery are smashed, it is clear that the hotel is the latest target of a local protection racket and Ken insists on taking the battle to the enemy.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Four challengers fight to the death, but only one can win to face Lock-Jaw and earn the chance to go on to fight the other champions for the Golden Bolt.

programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. When Caroline's friend Irena Gleskova is swindled out of a 12th-century ivory icon by suave confidence trickster Alan Sutherland, Caroline plans to avenge her by buying the icon at an auction to offer to him.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Regan is fitted up by an ex-con making an effort to get his daughter's criminal boyfriend out of the picture.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the dodgy dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. When Arthur's GP orders him to cut down on booze and cigars, his grip on reality is called into question after he demands police protection from an angry customer.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank find a vast junkyard in Maryland where Frank offers big money for a 1939 Plymouth coupe, and a large collection of rare motorbikes is discovered.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As rising temperatures soften the ice road, the truckers risk a cold and watery grave. Their only hope is to form a convoy, but it is never easy on terrible terrain.

programme.title: Terminator II: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The indestructible Arnie's back in this Oscar-winning sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programme.title: Terminator II: Judgment Day
programme.desc: The indestructible Arnie's back in this Oscar-winning sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the top division of French football, featuring Nantes v Marseille, PSG v Lorient, Metz v Monaco, Nice v Lens, Lille v Le Havre and Lyon v Rennes.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Bobby Zamora and diver Luc Boerrigter as they return to The Lake of Dreams, aka Grenville. Having failed to land one of the lake's giants in front of the underwater cameras on their previous trip here together, this time they target a huge carp of over 60lbs. Being spring, the carp are constantly on the move around the lake, with the team in hot pursuit. Will the carp run rings around the team, or will the mobile tactics pay off to bank that big one?

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. Olympic champion Jordan Chiles shows the chefs how to find balance in a gymnastics-themed challenge when they are tasked with impressing guest judge chef Evan Funke with four signature pasta dishes - while serving beach volleyball Olympic gold medallist Alix Klineman and actor and comedian Kel Mitchell, some chefs are praised for rising as leaders while others crash and burn.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection. [S]

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the planet's biggest and best motorsport series. These include the World Rally Championship (WRC), Formula One, World Motocross, NASCAR, British Touring Cars and much more.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and the Contessa are the victims of a car crash which was engineered to get information out of them about a witness that they have been hired to protect.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas investigates the murder of his old partner Lieutenant Tanaka and discovers that he was killed by well-known thug Grady Walker, who has escaped from an institution with the help of a crooked doctor.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo accuses a district attorney of corruption for failing to convict his friend's killer - when he is suspended from duty for the outburst, he elects to set out to get justice on his own.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Sixties adventure series about suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint finds some heady wine at the end of a counterfeit trail leading from London to Switzerland via Paris, and the involvement of a bogus countess only complicates matters further.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Veteran actors TP McKenna, William Simons and Larry Lamb guest star in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. A request to sail a barge from Hemel Hempstead to Birmingham seems to offer Ken a perfect opportunity for a romantic weekend on the waterways with Doreen, but the barge owner is clearly unpopular on the canal and his cargo is distinctly peculiar.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Regan is fitted up by an ex-con making an effort to get his daughter's criminal boyfriend out of the picture.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Eight hopefuls slug it out to the death in a Sin City Slugfest for the right to take on Rotator - the ultimate winner of the Slugfest will join the Field of Champions to compete for the exclusive Golden Bolt.

programme.desc: Live coverage of racing from Chester on the third and final day of the May Meeting, presented by Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani. [S]

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan. [S]

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Harry and the Contessa are the victims of a car crash which was engineered to get information out of them about a witness that they have been hired to protect.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Carter's girlfriend asks him to find a missing villain, but the plot thickens when he is found dead.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the dodgy dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. As Arthur continues his business ventures in Europe, Ray is given the task of minding a valuable racing pigeon due to race from London to Bradford with a prize of 10,000 pounds at stake.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank meet a quirky antiques dealer in New Orleans, but getting him to part with his sprawling collection proves a challenge.

programme.desc: Bond seeks revenge on a drugs baron by bringing his empire to its knees
